who: small law firms processing 5–15 audit reports/month
offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 audit reports/month, compliance issues cause delays in client reporting. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in preparing timely and accurate audit reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for small law firms
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process to reduce steps
